databrew.job.datacatalogoutput.CfnAbout: Represents options that specify how and where in the AWS Glue Data Catalog DataBrew writes the output generated by recipe jobs.

databrew.job.datacatalogoutput.CatalogId.Description: The unique identifier of the AWS account that holds the Data Catalog that stores the data.

databrew.job.datacatalogoutput.DatabaseN.Description: The name of a database in the Data Catalog.

databrew.job.datacatalogoutput.DatabaseO.Description: Represents options that specify how and where DataBrew writes the database output generated by recipe jobs.

databrew.job.datacatalogoutput.Overwrite.Description: A value that, if true, means that any data in the location specified for output is overwritten with new output. Not supported with DatabaseOptions.

databrew.job.datacatalogoutput.S3Options.Description: Represents options that specify how and where DataBrew writes the Amazon S3 output generated by recipe jobs.

databrew.job.datacatalogoutput.TableName.Description: The name of a table in the Data Catalog.
